description_long: This is a tall, freestanding shelving unit with a combination of open shelves and a lower cabinet section. The upper portion consists of four evenly spaced shelves supported by a gold-colored metal frame, providing ample space for display or storage. The lower section features a rectangular cabinet with six horizontal drawers, each equipped with a black handle, and a light wood finish. The top surface of the cabinet appears to be a solid, stone-like material, contrasting with the wood and metal elements. The back of the cabinet is plain, with no visible openings or hardware, and the sides are finished in the same light wood as the front. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for use in urban interiors such as offices, lobbies, or upscale retail spaces.
description: A modern, freestanding shelving unit with gold metal open shelves above a light wood cabinet featuring six drawers and black handles. The top surface is stone-like, and the design is sleek and functional.
description_view_0: Front view showing four gold-framed shelves above a six-drawer light wood cabinet with black handles.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the cabinet and the open structure of the gold metal shelving.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back panel of the cabinet and the open shelves above.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the depth and open shelving structure.
